edited.speaker: Pablo
edited.text: Morley had taken "drink" literally for a moment. Then, as he is about to finish his sentence, a Corsair without a helmet comes up behind him and puts a heavy gauntleted hand on his shoulder. Morley looks at him. The Corsair pulls out his rifle, fires once into the air, and holsters it. "Morley will find you." He tells Remy to get going. While Remy gathers the rest of the copper, he kicks Remy hard: "Leave it there, you dolt." They start walking off toward North Gate—actually toward the Brass District.
